title: Spear
effect: A one-handed pole about 3 to 5 feet (1 to 1.5 m) long with a stabbing blade on the end. Throwing dart: A very short, light spear meant to be thrown rather than used in melee.
details: A one-handed pole about 3 to 5 feet (1 to 1.5 m) long with a stabbing blade on the end.
Throwing dart: A very short, light spear meant to be thrown rather than used in melee.
